git diff to upgrade to 0.97.2

Apologies, there were two patch versions released before this report got merged, so here is the updated diff.

- portlint: OK (looks fine.)

- testport: OK (poudriere: <12.3-RELEASE, 12.3-STABLE, 13.0-RELEASE, 13.0-STABLE, 14.0-CURRENT>, < amd64/i386 >, <manpages + with/without extended> tested)
